project_description: This is the project description, could match github.com repo description.

__prompts__.create_repo: Would you like to create a repo on github.com?
__prompts__.receive_updates: Would you like to receive upstream template updates via pull requests?
__prompts__.add_team: Would you like to add project team members to COMMUNITY.md?
__prompts__.project_type: Is this project software (code), content, or data? (Determines which open licenses are valid for DPG Indicator 2.)
__prompts__.license: Which open license? Software must use an OSI license (MIT/Apache-2.0/GPL-3.0/...); content uses Creative Commons; data uses an Open Definition license. CC0 is NOT valid for software. See maturity/licenses.json.
